
This page explains how to contribute to the wiki

It is here because the wiki is large with [[Special:AllPages|{{NUMBEROFARTICLES}} pages]] and as such a systematic approach to improvement is necessary to help overcome limiting factors to its utility

[[Category:Lifeism Wiki]]
==Categories==
https://lifeism.miraheze.org/wiki/Category:Categories_needing_work <br>
https://lifeism.miraheze.org/wiki/Category:First_Level_Categories
==Gaiad Importing==
Import the Gaiad onto this wiki
==Splitting==
Differentiate the split articles of [[Conjunction bias]] and [[Powers and Principalities]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
